title: Trimming Shop 29cm x 25m Roll of Organza Sheer Fabric - Elegant Decorative Cloth for Wedding Chair Bows, Table Runners, Party Favours - Crafting Supplies for Ribbons, Dress Accents,and Bags, Gold
features: 𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐙𝐀 𝐑𝐎𝐋𝐋 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄: The organza fabric roll has a length of 25m and a width of 29cm

𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: Made from organza fabric. Lightweight and durable material makes it a popular choice for use in gift packaging, ribbons and bows. Please note that due to the light and screen difference, the item's colour may be slightly different from the pictures, thanks for understanding
𝐃𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐑 𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋: The luxurious and elegant look of this fabric creates a very romantic ambience making it ideal for customizing the look of any space
𝐕𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐓𝐘 𝐎𝐅 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐎𝐔𝐑𝐒: Our organza rolls are available in a variety of elegant and classic colours that provide perfect finishing touches to an event

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐒: To decorate an event such as a wedding, valentine's day, birthday or any other event, simply choose the colour that best complements or matches the theme of the event and use it for creating beautiful table runners, bridal bouquet, DIY crafts, chair sashes, making bows, and other decor elements. Suitable for indoor and outdoor decoration
description: Product Description Previous page Wow your guests by decorating the tables with swags made from this organza fabric It can be tied around the chair and finished in a bow or across and tied at the side The lustrous shine of our organza role adds more glitz to every space Organza swags draping the wedding columns is one of the most picturesque ways of using organza roll Next page 1 Banquet Tableware 2 Chair Sashes 3 Decor 4 Wedding Organza is a versatile fabric which is used in a lot of ways for event decoration. It exquisitely complements the theme of any occasion and completes the décor. This roll of organza fabric can be cut into any size and shape depending on how you want to use it Our Organza material is a translucent fabric that comes with an elegant sheen and glitter which makes it an ideal decor element for any special occassion. The Roll comes in a length of 26 metre and has a width of 29cm Previous page Next page 1 Birthday 2 Bride Bouquet 3 Bride Dress 4 Curtain
